steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is “constantly evolving” paired with “changes in size and shape”—the passage describes something in constant transformation.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Dynamic means characterized by constant change. This word captures the delta's nature perfectly: its channels and terrain continuously shift.

A (immutable) contradicts this directly; B (unrivaled) and C (sustainable) are unrelated to transformation.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
